tools._comment: EXAMPLE TOOL — remove _comment and replace all fields with your own. Required fields: id (must NOT start with 'purlin.' or 'community.'), friendly_name, description. Optional: code, agent_instructions, tags. See tools/toolbox/purlin_tools.json for format examples.
tools.agent_instructions: Natural language instructions for the agent when executing this tool. Set to null if no agent-specific guidance is needed.
